ogTitle: Cundle Flat vs Cundumbul: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cundle Flat and Cundumbul.
heading: Cundle Flat vs Cundumbul — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cundle Flat, New South Wales and Cundumbul, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cundumbul has a lower overall climate risk score (44/100) compared to Cundle Flat (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cundle Flat or Cundumbul safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cundle Flat has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Cundumbul scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cundle Flat scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Cundumbul scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cundle Flat or Cundumbul?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cundumbul has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
